phases.P0: Foundation — ship, dev stack, ops locks, CI
phases.P1: Trust Ledger — TLE lifecycle, evidence, export
phases.P2: Governance API — evaluate, audit, pilot auth, webhooks
phases.P3: Connectors live — Purview, Entra, M365 audit sync
phases.P4: Workspace & GTM — UI, www, procurement assets
phases.P6: Compliance — append-only proofs, retention, SOC narratives
phases.P8: Integrations — MSB channel, partners, API marketplace
phases.P9: Horizon — research, ML confidence, cross-product bridges

tiers.T1: Critical — unblocks revenue or production ship

update_policy: After each ship session: mark completed IDs done via scripts/update-plan-status.py; regenerate only when adding phases/tiers.
